results.title: Good Time
results.overview: After a botched bank robbery lands his younger brother in prison, Connie Nikas embarks on a twisted odyssey through New York City's underworld to get his brother Nick out of jail.

results.title: Good Time Henry
results.overview: Henry is lured by old pal Hale into a night on the town despite fears that his wife will discover their hijinks.

results.title: For a Good Time, Call...
results.overview: College "frenemies" Lauren and Katie move in together after losing a relationship and rent control, respectively. Sharing Katie's late grandmother's apartment in New York City, the girls bicker with each other until one fateful night, when Katie's noisy bedroom activities make Lauren barge in and discover a dirty little secret. This revelation brings them closer together, and Lauren (the brains) and Katie (the talent) concoct a wildly successful business venture. As profits swell, the girls reevaluate their hopes and dreams and realize that just because someone pees in your hair in college doesn't mean she won't be your best friend 10 years later.

results.title: Good Time Charley
results.overview: Song-and-dance man Charles Edward Keene (Good Time Charley) is bereft when his wife, Elaine, dies as a result of a fall incurred trying to evade the advances of Hartwell, her manager. Years later, his daughter, Rosita, becomes an overnight sensation as a result of her cafe act under Hartwell's management, and Charley is given a bit part in the show at her request.

results.title: Good-Time Girl
results.overview: Sent to a home for "problem" girls,  incipient juvenile delinquent Gwen receives a crash course in petty crime. Back on the outside, she falls in with the usual bad crowd, and suffers spectacularly as a result.

results.title: Good Time Max
results.overview: Two genius brothers grow up and grow apart as one becomes a successful surgeon and the other pursues a drug-fueled high life.

results.title: Good Time
results.overview: An old friend comes back after a long time. They spend good time together like nothing ever changed, watching TV, playing games, drinking beer, listening to music, and talking about life. For a moment, it feels like the good old days again. But when the friend leaves something feels different.

results.title: The Last Good Time
results.overview: A reclusive aging widower struggling with tax problems has a complete change in his views of life as he has a chance encounter with a young woman who moves in with him briefly.

results.title: Good Time Charley
results.overview: After exposing a comet conspiracy, astronomer Charley Codwell must redeem himself, uncover the truth, and stop mass hysteria before it's too late.

results.title: The Good Time Girls
results.overview: A group of women band together as they go to war against a pack of men who have done them wrong at every turn.

results.title: A Good Time
results.overview: A couple will always forgive each other.

results.title: The Good Time Girls
results.overview: The oil rigs provide rich pickings for those who work on them, but for wives isolated from husbands affluence is not enough.

results.title: All in Good Time
results.overview: A Guinness advert in the form of a short comic film set in a traditional country pub.

results.title: Good Time Charlie
results.overview: Ben Sinclair stars as Charlie, a middle-aged country rocker turned real estate agent who clings to his dreams of stardom in the California desert. When he is asked to show a listing at an abandoned homestead deep in the Mojave, a mysterious encounter leaves him bitten and bewildered, forcing him to confront the reality of his dreams.

results.title: Good Time Girl!
results.overview: A young woman still healing from a painful past, pushes herself to go on a first date in hopes of reclaiming a sense of normalcy. What begins as a playful, promising night out soon tests the fragile line between moving forward and confronting what she hasn’t fully left behind.

results.title: All in Good Time
results.overview: During an execution, a chance confrontation takes place between the would-be heir to a criminal syndicate and his captive. Time is running out and the two men explore the choices that led them to this moment.

results.title: Good Time
results.overview: There’s a sense of being hollowed out slowly and deeply, as if everything is happening all over again, yet it exists only within the images. The life within the images keeps rolling and reminding me that I no longer possess that time — that good time has already slipped away.

results.title: A Royal Good Time
results.overview: A Little King cartoon from the Van Beuren Studios.

results.title: All in Good Time
results.overview: Atul and Vina, a newly-wed couple, are unable to consummate their marriage due to his meddling parents. As a result, both are left frustrated and complications start arising in their relationship.

results.title: A Bloody Good Time
results.overview: Naïve British party boy, Dan, helps his American niece, Ivory, navigate her first period with the help of a local shopkeeper - and some ice cream.
